_comment: MCP servers extend the agent with extra tools (browsers, diagramming, SaaS APIs). These are DYNAMIC context — add only the ones a project actually needs (R10: keep the surface small). Copy the relevant block into your project's .mcp.json (project scope) or ~/.claude/settings.json under mcpServers (global). Pick by profile — see config/plugins.md. None of these are required to run the harness.

playwright._use: Browser automation — drive a real browser to verify UI changes (software-dev, document render-checks).

excalidraw._use: Clean diagrams (creative-design). Pairs with the excalidraw-diagram skill.

context7._use: Fetch current library/framework/API docs on demand (all profiles). Often available as a hosted MCP — prefer that if your client already has it.

_other_useful_servers_by_profile.marketing-outreach: Your email/ESP/CRM MCP (e.g. Kit.com, HubSpot) for list/segment/broadcast ops.
_other_useful_servers_by_profile.general-admin: Email/calendar + a file-storage MCP (e.g. Dropbox, Google Drive) for inbox/file ops.
_other_useful_servers_by_profile.creative-design: An image/video generation MCP for visual assets.
_other_useful_servers_by_profile.devops-setup: Error-monitoring (e.g. Sentry) MCP/CLI, cloud-provider MCPs for your stack.
